Who we help

Advice built around your stage of life.

Wherever you are on the journey, the goal is the same — clarity today, confidence tomorrow.

Entrepreneurs & professionals

Busy building something. We turn income into long-term, tax-efficient wealth — so your money works as hard as you do.

→

Preparing for retirement

Approaching the finish line of work. We answer the big question — “will I be okay?” — with a clear, numbers-backed plan.

→

Already in retirement

Enjoying the life you’ve earned. We help your savings last, stay tax-smart, and pass on your legacy exactly as you intend.

→

What we do

Everything you need. Nothing you don’t.

Joined-up financial planning — because the best decisions in one area rarely happen in isolation.

Retirement planning

Strategies aligned with your retirement goals, so your future is secure and on your terms.

Tax optimisation

Structuring your finances to minimise tax and keep more of what you’ve earned working for you.

Investment management

Expert, independent guidance to help grow and protect your investments through every market.

Estate planning

Protecting your legacy through thoughtful, strategic planning — so your wealth passes on the way you intend.

Pension review

Evaluating your current pensions to make sure they’re genuinely on track to meet your objectives.

Cashflow planning

Mapping your money over a lifetime to give you stability today and confidence about tomorrow.

Your journey with us

Four clear steps. No surprises.

Working with an adviser shouldn’t feel opaque. Here’s exactly how it goes — from first hello to a plan that grows with you.

  1. 01

    Initial meeting

    An in-depth, no-obligation conversation about your goals, income, assets and attitude to risk. This one’s free.

  2. 02

    Planning

    We research, analyse and build a personalised strategy designed entirely around your goals.

  3. 03

    Action

    We handle the implementation — paperwork, accounts and provider coordination — so you don’t have to.

  4. 04

    Review

    Life changes, markets move. We meet regularly to keep your plan aligned with both.

MC [PLACEHOLDER — adviser photo]
10+years' experience
Independent

About Chambers Financial

Meet Michael Chambers

Michael has dedicated over a decade to financial services — progressing through postgraduate administration, paraplanning and investment consulting, across independent, restricted, discretionary and offshore firms.

That breadth shaped one conviction: people deserve advice that’s genuinely independent, transparent and built around them. That’s exactly why he founded Chambers Financial.

  • Honesty & integrity
  • Transparency
  • Independence
  • Expert advice
  • Personal approach
  • Competitive pricing

In their words

What clients say

No testimonials are published on the current site, so these are marked as placeholders rather than invented.

Good to know

Frequently asked questions

Is the first consultation really free?

Yes. The initial meeting is a no-obligation conversation to understand your situation and see whether we’re the right fit — at no cost.

What does “independent” actually mean?

Our advice spans the whole of the market and isn’t tied to any provider or product. Recommendations are based solely on what’s right for you.

Are you regulated?

Yes. Chambers Financial Ltd is an Appointed Representative of ValidPath Limited, authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority. Our FCA reference is 1016681.

Do I need a lot of money to work with you?

No — we work with people at different stages, with competitive, transparent pricing. [PLACEHOLDER — confirm any minimum or fee structure.]

Where are you based and can we meet remotely?

We’re based at 12 Lea Avenue, Rye, East Sussex. [PLACEHOLDER — confirm remote / video meeting availability.]

Take control of your finances today.

The best plans begin with a simple chat about what matters to you. Book your free consultation — no obligation, no jargon.

The value of investments can fall as well as rise and you may get back less than you invested. This information does not constitute financial advice.
